name: Tushar Jain
tagline: Driven Software Developer specializing in scalable backend systems, microservices, and full-stack development. Proficient in Python, Node.js, React, and cloud technologies.
about: Tushar Jain is an Electronics and Communication Engineering student and a proficient Software Developer with a proven track record in designing and implementing scalable backend services, microservices, and optimizing API performance. Through extensive internship experience and diverse projects, Tushar has delivered robust, efficient solutions for ERP, healthcare platforms, and chat messaging systems. He is proficient in Python, JavaScript, Go, NestJS, and React, with hands-on experience across databases like MongoDB and PostgreSQL, cloud platforms (Azure, GCP), and CI/CD pipelines. Tushar also maintains a keen interest in AI/ML, continuously seeking innovative approaches to complex challenges.
highlights: Architected and developed scalable backend services using NestJS, implementing modular architecture and REST APIs.
Built Python-based microservices for PDF processing and asynchronous workflows.
Designed backend systems for a healthcare platform (Trijog), including booking, invoicing, and communication pipelines.
Established CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions, improving deployment reliability.
Developed backend modules for an ERP system (ERPLite) with reporting capabilities.
Designed and implemented REST APIs and database schemas using Node.js and MongoDB.
Optimized API performance and improved frontend-backend integration for system efficiency.
Strengthened security protocols of a chat messaging system, resulting in zero data breaches.
Enhanced Google Authentication System, streamlining login process and reducing login time by 40%.
Collaborated on an AI/ML-based Flipkart recommender system, achieving Semi-Finalist status in Flipkart Grid 5.0.
Selected for Amazon ML Summer School 2024.

projects.name: Contest-Saathi
projects.description: A web application designed to provide personalized email notifications for real-time contest updates. Successfully built a dedicated user base of over 50 active subscribers by delivering timely contest reminders.

projects.name: Insight Terminal
projects.description: A Cobra-based CLI tool that streamlines user interaction with Gemini AI, significantly enhancing command-line efficiency. It leverages Gemini AI's advanced natural language processing to deliver accurate, real-time responses and information retrieval directly within the terminal.
